name: Arroz Dulce ('Sweet Rice' from Buena Vista Mo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice in water according to usual instructions, but stop cooking when it is almost done.
2. Add the cinnamon and continue cooking for 3-5 more minutes.
3. Stir in both types of milk.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook for an additional 15 minutes until all the milk is absorbed.
